prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime illustration of a gothic twin-tail schoolgirl performing a powerful superhero landing in a shattered urban crater. She is centered in a low-angle dynamic pose with one fist smashed into cracked pavement, one knee down, the other leg raised forward, conveying explosive impact and confidence. She has black hair styled into two huge high curly twin-tails with glossy highlights, each tied with a purple bow and pearl-like bead, with loose strands flying upward from the force. Her face is covered by a large soft-edged dark square censor block centered over the head, hiding all facial features. Dress her in a dark gothic street-school outfit: oversized black hooded jacket, deep purple top, purple-and-black plaid pleated skirt, black knee-high socks, and chunky black lace-up combat boots. The scene erupts with broken stone slabs, flying rocks, dust, sparks, and debris suspended around her, with a vertical surge of violet lightning and purple energy behind her. Use intense cinematic lighting, high contrast, rim light on hair and clothing, motion blur on debris, detailed rubble texture, dark purple and black color palette, dramatic manga/anime rendering, ultra-detailed digital painting, energetic composition, portrait orientation, no text.
